SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.id

クラス Cuid2

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.id.Cuid2
public final class Cuid2 extends Object
Utilities and constants for Cuid2-compatible string identifiers (SHA3-512, base36, session counter, fingerprint). This class validates contracts on public methods where stated.

The default fingerprint path matches the reference when no global object keys are available (entropy-only sourceString). It does not reproduce Node.js fingerprints derived from Object.keys(global).

導入されたバージョン:
0.2.0

  • フィールドの概要

    フィールド
    修飾子とタイプ
    フィールド
    説明
    static final int
    DEFAULT_LENGTH
    Default output length (characters), matching @paralleldrive/cuid2.
    static final int
    FINGERPRINT_LENGTH
    Length of fingerprint strings produced by createDefaultFingerprint(RandomGenerator).
    static final int
    INITIAL_COUNT_MAX
    Exclusive upper bound for sampling the initial counter (initialCountMax in the reference).
    static final int
    MAX_LENGTH
    Maximum output length (bigLength in the reference).
    static final int
    MIN_LENGTH
    Minimum supported output length (aligned with isCuid lower bound in the reference).

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    static @NonNull String
    createDefaultFingerprint(@NonNull RandomGenerator rng)
    Builds a default fingerprint: hash(createEntropy({@value #FINGERPRINT_LENGTH}, rng)).substring(0, {@value #FINGERPRINT_LENGTH}).
    static @NonNull String
    generate(int length, @NonNull RandomGenerator rng, @NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull String fingerprint, @NonNull AtomicLong counter)
    One Cuid2-shaped id (see Cuid2IdGenerator).
    static boolean
    isValid(@NonNull CharSequence id)
    Returns whether id matches Cuid2 shape: first character a-z, remainder 0-9a-z, length in [2, 32].

    クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      public static final int INITIAL_COUNT_MAX
      Exclusive upper bound for sampling the initial counter (initialCountMax in the reference).

      • 定数フィールド値

      Length of fingerprint strings produced by createDefaultFingerprint(RandomGenerator).
      関連項目:
      • 定数フィールド値

  • メソッドの詳細

    • isValid

      public static boolean isValid(@NonNull @NonNull CharSequence id)
      Returns whether id matches Cuid2 shape: first character a-z, remainder 0-9a-z, length in [2, 32].
      パラメータ:
      id - candidate id, must not be null
      戻り値:
      true if the candidate matches
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if id is null
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • createDefaultFingerprint

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String createDefaultFingerprint(@NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator rng)
      Builds a default fingerprint: hash(createEntropy({@value #FINGERPRINT_LENGTH}, rng)).substring(0, {@value #FINGERPRINT_LENGTH}).
      パラメータ:
      rng - entropy source, must not be null
      戻り値:
      a non-null fingerprint string of length 32
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if rng is null
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • generate

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String generate(int length, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator rng, @NonNull @NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull @NonNull String fingerprint, @NonNull @NonNull AtomicLong counter)
      One Cuid2-shaped id (see Cuid2IdGenerator). Public for tests; production code typically uses Cuid2IdGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      length - output length (2–32)
      rng - random source, must not be null
      clock - clock for Unix milliseconds, must not be null
      fingerprint - concatenated into the hash input (reference uses a 32-character default); must not be null or empty
      counter - session counter (AtomicLong.getAndIncrement() per call)
      戻り値:
      a non-null id of length length
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any reference argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if length is out of range, fingerprint is empty, or clock millis are not representable as for UUID v7
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0
